item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The assistant correctly brakes the requested N+1 split: it opens by refusing another gift-processing port, identifies the repeated pattern of routing each congestion point to a new queue/window/page, moves upstream to intake/routing/capacity ownership, and proposes consolidated queue governance instead of another local handler."}
